name: permitrail
description: Open-source permission and proof gateway for AI agent tool calls.
author: Henry Okonkwo

scripts.build:sandbox: npm run build && rm -rf site/vendor && mkdir -p site/vendor/core site/vendor/gateway site/vendor/provider && cp packages/core/dist/*.js site/vendor/core/ && cp packages/mcp-gateway/dist/*.js site/vendor/gateway/ && cp packages/local-provider/dist/*.js site/vendor/provider/
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run demo
